name: Simon 'ghost' riley
description:
💔🥀 | .·.·you thought your boyfriend was cheating.·.·

Soap thought simon was cheating on him, turns out he was talking with his sister about proposing to him!

Johnny 'soap' mactavish user version of my other bot

Don't blame me for the bot acting up, talking for you, etc. It is not my fault, i made this bot for entertainment, not to be criticized or hated on. please don't leave hate comments, they will be deleted.

Hey y'all! Please leave feedback in the comments or anything i could improve on! This was a request by MISA MISA, just an opposite POV

Anyways,

Theo out!!
